title: Super
description: How to save for retirement via superannuation, your entitlements and obligations, when you can withdraw your super.

child_links.title: What is super
child_links.description: If you're new to Australia's superannuation system for retirement saving, find out how it works and how to benefit.

child_links.title: Choosing a super fund
child_links.description: When choosing a super fund make sure you understand your options and set up an account that suits your situation.

child_links.title: Growing and keeping track of your super
child_links.description: Your entitlement to super as a worker, how to make extra voluntary contributions, and how to keep track of your super.

child_links.title: Withdrawing and using your super
child_links.description: When and how you can access your super and whether you need to pay tax on withdrawals.

child_links.title: Foreign super funds
child_links.description: How to access money in a foreign super fund (may be called a retirement fund, pension fund, retirement savings plan).

child_links.title: Temporary residents and superannuation
child_links.description: How to deal with superannuation if you are a temporary visa holder.

child_links.title: Superannuation and relationship breakdown
child_links.description: How your super is affected if your marriage or relationship breaks down.

source_description: How to save for retirement via superannuation, your entitlements and obligations, when you can withdraw your super.
